title: avengers
description: Avengers Mod is a custom Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11 mod focused first on Iron Man, with a full progression system built around exploration, crafting, armor upgrading, energy-powered flight, and combat abilities. Future expands to all other heros
body:
Avengers Mod is a custom Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11 mod focused first on Iron Man, with a full progression system built around exploration, crafting, armor upgrading, energy-powered flight, and combat abilities.

Note : download arc reactor locator mod too

Main progression:
- Mine Titanium Ore underground between Y -20 and -58
- Smelt Titanium Ore into Titanium Scrap
- Craft Gold Titanium Alloy Ingot using gold nuggets, iron nuggets, and titanium scrap
- Find the Iron Man Upgrade Template from survival loot sources like shipwrecks, buried treasure, village blacksmith-type chests, and fishing treasure
- Upgrade Diamond armor into Iron Man armor through the smithing table
- Find the rare underground Arc Reactor structure in the Overworld
- Mine Arc Reactor Core Ore from the center of the structure to obtain Arc Reactor Core
- Craft the Arc Reactor
- Insert the Arc Reactor into the dedicated Iron Man chestplate reactor slot
- Use the powered suit for flight, repulsor combat, and survival buffs

Iron Man suit features:
- Helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots
- Stronger than Netherite
- Full-set passive powers:
  - Fire Resistance
  - Water Breathing
  - Speed
  - Strength
  - Night Vision
  - Fall damage immunity
- Powers require the full suit plus an installed Arc Reactor

Arc Reactor system:
- Arc Reactor is a real item with stored persistent energy
- Chestplate has a dedicated Arc Reactor slot
- Reactor energy is preserved even when removed and reinserted
- Energy powers flight and repulsor blast
- Custom HUD energy bar appears at the top center of the screen
- Arc Reactor item itself shows an energy bar and tooltip

Flight system:
- Elytra-style jet glide, not creative hover
- Powered by Arc Reactor energy
- Smooth forward boost based on look direction
- Boot thruster sound while flying
- Boot thruster particles while gliding

Repulsor system:
- Repulsor blast fires from the hand
- Visible beam effect
- Immediate client-side beam feel
- Server-side damage and hit particles
- High damage output, including strong Ender Dragon damage
- Powered by Arc Reactor energy

World and survival content:
- Titanium ore generation
- Reactor Stone decorative block set:
  - block
  - stairs
  - slab
  - wall
  - pillar
  - bricks
- Arc Reactor Core Ore block
- Rare underground Arc Reactor structure generation
- Upgrade template loot integration into survival structures and fishing

Visual and UI features:
- Dedicated Arc Reactor slot in the inventory system
- Arc Reactor energy bar in HUD
- Arc Reactor tooltip showing exact energy
- Custom chestplate reactor screen support
- Armor, reactor, and structure visuals tailored for Iron Man progression

Current focus:
This version of the mod is centered on Iron Man only, with future expansion planned for other Avengers such as Thor and Hawkeye.
